name: acetylacetone to dehydro coenzyme F420-0
summary: A 11-step route from acetylacetone to dehydro coenzyme F420-0(3−), ingested from Rhea. Every step is curated by Rhea and independently verified here to balance in mass and charge.

reactions.name: 2-phospho-L-lactate transferase
reactions.equation: enolpyruvoyl-2-diphospho-5'-guanosine + 7,8-didemethyl-8-hydroxy-5-deazariboflavin = dehydro coenzyme F420-0 + GMP + H(+)

reactions.name: tRNA 4-demethylwyosine synthase (AdoMet-dependent)
reactions.equation: N(1)-methylguanosine(37) in tRNA(Phe) + pyruvate + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 4-demethylwyosine(37) in tRNA(Phe) + 5'-deoxyadenosine + L-methionine + CO2 + H2O

reactions.name: tRNA (N(6)-L-threonylcarbamoyladenosine(37)-C(2))-methylthiotransferase
reactions.equation: N(6)-L-threonylcarbamoyladenosine(37) in tRNA + (sulfur carrier)-SH + AH2 + 2 S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 2-methylsulfanyl-N(6)-L-threonylcarbamoyladenosine(37) in tRNA + (sulfur carrier)-H + 5'-deoxyadenosine + L-methionine + A + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + 2 H(+)

reactions.name: glutamate dehydrogenase
reactions.equation: L-glutamate + NAD(+) + H2O = 2-oxoglutarate + NH4(+) + NADH + H(+)

reactions.name: carbamoyl-serine ammonia-lyase
reactions.equation: O-carbamoyl-L-serine + H2O + H(+) = pyruvate + 2 NH4(+) + CO2
